1116.issue: [W1116] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/io-package.json) but "@sentry/*" packages (@sentry/node, @sentry/tracing) are listed as dependencies in [package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/package.json). When using the sentry plugin, explicit @sentry/* dependencies should not be added.

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.4.4 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3035.issue: [S3035] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.4.4" was found for npm latest release 1.4.4. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "source-map-resolve" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8005.issue: [W8005] Latest GitHub release tag (1.4.5) does not match latest npm version (1.4.4).

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/package.json)

0082.issue: [S0082] Package "crc-32" (dependencies) can be updated from 1.2.0 to 1.2.2. The newer version has been published for 1513 days. Please evaluate updating [package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/git-kick/ioBroker.e3dc-rscp/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
